context: Tests whether the Mermaid diagrams skill helps an agent complete the er-cardinality-repair scenario while following diagram type, syntax, semantic, renderer, safety, and claim-discipline guidance relevant to the task.

checklist.name: Uses ER diagram syntax
checklist.description: Returns Mermaid erDiagram syntax rather than switching to a class diagram or flowchart.

checklist.name: Repairs cardinality markers
checklist.description: Replaces prose cardinalities such as `one to many` with valid Mermaid ER cardinality notation.

checklist.name: Preserves entities and attributes
checklist.description: Keeps USER, DIAGRAM, and REVIEW with concise id/title/email/rating-style fields.

checklist.name: Preserves relationship semantics
checklist.description: Represents User-to-Diagram as one-to-many, Diagram-to-Review as zero-or-more reviews, and Review-to-User as exactly one author.

checklist.name: Explains smallest repair
checklist.description: Explains the cardinality syntax repair briefly without inventing extra model details.
